programmes.show_description: O Thou Invisible Spirit of Wine: When paranormal activity is reported in a Tudor pub, old family feuds are brought to a head.
Deception on His Mind: Another case for the crime-solving odd couple. The duo are caught in a tangled web of racial tension when investigating the murder of a young Asian man.
History: As the girls sort out their jumble for a car-boot sale, Tracey unearths a dark secret in the popular Chigwell comedy.
The Phoenix Strangler: Part 2: The case of the Phoenix Strangler continues with more bodies being discovered. Micki makes a breakthrough, and her team faces a perilous situation.
Shopping from Home.
Shopping from Home.
Trust: Tracey falls for her smooth therapist Gerald and argues with Darryl about the lack of trust in their relationship when he bans her from continuing her sessions.
Thirty Something: Sibling sitcom and the Essex girls have the birthday blues. Sharon is approaching her 30th birthday but is unable to see a bright future ahead of her.
Love on the Run: More Essex comedy from the Chigwell sisters. Darryl has been taken to hospital with appendicitis and plans to escape and spend the night with his wife.
Eric of Arabia: The denim-clad antique dealer with an eye for a bargain and the ladies. Lovejoy is asked by Sir Desmond Clark to authenticate an Oriental terracotta pig.
Loveknots: Lighthearted drama series. When Harriet Fisher buys a Berber rug at an auction, Lovejoy gets tangled up in a web of passion, unrequited love and umbrella stands.
Smoke Your Nose: Adventures with the wheeler dealer antiques trader. Rev Harry Nettles wagers a bet with Lovejoy that there is a Roman mosaic in the field next to his church.
The Penitent Man: Flambeau is incarcerated under suspicion of murder, but denies killing his cohort Flynn, and asks Father Brown to hear his confession if he is convicted.
Gloves Off: The popular mystery series starring James Bolam and Amanda Redman. The gun used to kill a boxer years ago surfaces in an armed robbery. Maggie O'Neill guest stars.
The Fourth Man: A dangerous case for the middle-aged detectives. The team uncover police corruption when probing a 30-year-old robbery, and someone wants them silenced for good.
The Eyes of Tiresias: Quirky drama series with Alan Davies as a magician who teams up with a crime writer to investigate mysteries. A little old lady is scared out of her wits.
The Queen of Poisons: Part One: When the Mayor dies in the middle of a meeting, Judith, Becks and Suzie uncover lies, scandal and blackmail. Guest starring Peter Davison.
The Queen of Poisons: Part Two: As the suspects' secrets stack up, Judith, Becks and Suzie still can't find anyone with a motive to hurt the Mayor. Guest starring Peter Davison.
Shot of Love: Mike and Beth take a long road trip to obtain divorce papers from his ex-wife, and Kristin and Daniel contend with the mysterious death of a man in a hotel room.
With the body count rising, Miles and Chandler struggle to put aside their differences in the face of their toughest adversary to date.
In the Guise of Death: Compelling crime-cracking with the inspector and his down-to-earth lady chum. A horse trainer is found hanged in his stable, but Lynley doubts it was suicide.
Gloves Off: The popular mystery series starring James Bolam and Amanda Redman. The gun used to kill a boxer years ago surfaces in an armed robbery. Maggie O'Neill guest stars.
My Brother's Keeper: Sister Reginald's ex-con brother Alfie shows up at the convent. The sisters agree to let him stay, but when an artist is found murdered, all eyes are on Alfie.
Trust: Tracey falls for her smooth therapist Gerald and argues with Darryl about the lack of trust in their relationship when he bans her from continuing her sessions.
Smoke and Mirrors: First Chapter: Mattie searches for new clues about her missing mother, but an onstage murder in a production of Jane's book brings her to the theatre.
Shopping from Home.
Shopping from Home.
Up in Smoke: Part 2: The relief have to cover for Jim Carver yet again when he arrives at the station still very drunk.
Homework: Ackland's romantic evening away from Sun Hill spirals into something more sinister when a neighbour appears on her doorstep - carrying a shotgun.
Knowing You: Holmes falls out with Proctor when he publicly undermines her.
Consumers: Jim Carver has gone missing, and fears for his safety grow when a youth is arrested in possession of his credit card.
Lock In: Jim Carver hits rock bottom when Burnside is forced to arrest his old friend for murder.
A distant cousin of Fred's who has Down's syndrome is taken in by the Buckles following the death of his mother. New recruit Valerie prepares for her first day at Nonnatus House.
Valerie treats a pregnant Somali woman who has undergone female genital circumcision, but who goes into hiding when the Nonnatus Team arrange for her to go into hospital.
Geordie heartthrob Robson Green stars in this feature-length 19th century drama. A rent collector in South Shields uses his talents as a card player to improve his lot.
Everyone's favourite Napoleonic hero embarks on another perilous mission. Sharpe arrives in India and learns that a British general's daughter has been kidnapped.
Lights, Camera, Murder!: A TV crew arrives to use St Vincent's Convent as a location for a spy thriller; the filming becomes all too real when a live gun is fired instead of a replica.
Flight: Emilia Fox stars in a feature-length forensics mystery. The murder of a well-known anti-fundamentalist Muslim, Amir Aziz, leads the team to a local taxi driver.
